grants.name: Amber Grant
grants.summary: Monthly grants for women-owned businesses, plus larger year-end awards.
grants.notes: Simple narrative application; monthly category grants roll into year-end awards.

grants.name: NASE Growth Grants
grants.summary: Multiple awards annually to help members grow (equipment, marketing, hiring).

grants.name: Verizon Small Business Digital Ready Grants
grants.summary: Periodic $10k grants for Digital Ready participants who complete program steps.
grants.notes: Typically requires completing at least two courses/coaching before applying.

grants.name: Venmo Small Business Grant
grants.summary: Annual grants for Venmo Business Profile users, plus mentorship resources.
grants.notes: Past cycles funded 20×$10k; a later cycle funded 10×$20k.

grants.name: Tory Burch Foundation Fellows Program
grants.summary: Yearlong fellowship for women entrepreneurs with a $5k education grant and resources.
grants.notes: Includes education grant (not unrestricted cash), training, mentors, and community.

grants.name: Cartier Women’s Initiative
grants.summary: Global program backing women-led impact ventures; significant grant awards and support.
grants.notes: Includes regional and Science & Technology Pioneer categories with funding and executive education.

grants.name: The Halstead Grant
grants.summary: Annual grant for emerging jewelry businesses (primarily silver).
grants.revenue_cap_note: Must be within first ~5 years; primarily silver focus.
grants.notes: Includes $1,000 merchandise credit and feedback from judges.

grants.name: Nav Small Business Grant
grants.summary: Recurring contest awarding cash grants to small businesses.
grants.notes: Historically includes a grand prize and a runner-up award.

grants.name: Hello Alice – Small Business Growth Fund
grants.sponsor: Hello Alice + partners (e.g., GEN, Progressive, Etsy)
grants.summary: Recurring partner-funded grants to accelerate growth.
grants.application_cycle: Multiple rounds per year (varies by partner)
grants.notes: Amounts/cycles vary by partner; consistent multi-year track record.

grants.name: Black Ambition Prize
grants.summary: Prizes for ventures led by Black and Hispanic founders; tiered awards and support.
grants.notes: Includes coaching/network; some awards structured via founder-friendly SAFE, with grant-like effect.

grants.name: SBIR (Phase I)
grants.summary: Non-dilutive R&D grants for technology startups (research feasibility).
grants.revenue_cap_note: Eligibility and amounts vary by agency; typical Phase I ranges shown.
grants.notes: Competitive federal program; awards/limits periodically updated by SBA.

grants.name: SBIR (Phase II)
grants.summary: Larger non-dilutive grants to continue successful Phase I R&D toward commercialization.
grants.revenue_cap_note: Ranges vary by agency; typical upper bound listed.
grants.notes: Only prior Phase I awardees are eligible; amounts vary by agency.
